title: Account of the Dissension among the Azraqites and the Reason for Its Breaking Out, until They Came to Ruin
description: Account of the Dissension among the Azraqites and the Reason for Its Breaking Out, until They Came to Ruin. Recorded under the year 77 AH (696–697 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 22.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 22
